notes: Tier 0: 3-GPU plumbing — fast visible canvas + input + sprite
goal: Build a tiny top-down canvas game: a visible player moves with arrow keys, a collectible increases score, generated sprite art is used, and restart resets state.
Build a small top-down canvas game where the player moves with arrow keys, collects items to increase score, and restart resets the run.

Build a small turn-based board game on canvas: click or tap to select a cell, commit a move, and show a visible state change; include keyboard fallback (arrows + Enter) so controls work in the test harness.
Build a small canvas game that uses generated sprite art (assets block), draws the sprite on canvas, and shows a visible animation or tween each frame.
Build a Pac-Man style canvas game: maze corridors, controllable player, pellets, ghosts that chase using pathfinding, score, lives, win/lose, restart, and visible movement.
